briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: init method \par \b I/O\/ \: Input -> Output \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5

memberdef.argsstring: (self, UnstructuredDocument document, Optional[dict] parameters=None, Optional[str] file_path=None)
memberdef.name: extract

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: extract method \par \b I/O\/ \: Input -> Output \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5

\par \b Purpose\/ \: __get_automatic_toc method \par \b I/O\/ \: Input -> Output \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5
\par \b Purpose\/ \: FintocStructureExtractor for document structure extraction pipeline

detaileddescription.para: This class is an implementation of the TOC extractor for the FinTOC 2022 Shared task <https://wp.lancs.ac.uk/cfie/fintoc2022/>_. The code is a modification of the winner's solution (ISP RAS team).

This structure extractor is used for English, French and Spanish financial prospects in PDF format (with a textual layer). It is recommended to use :class:~dedoc.readers.PdfTxtlayerReader to obtain document lines. You can find the more detailed description of this type of structure in the section :ref:fintoc_structure.
